description: Mapping for upstream building/starbase data from data.stfc.space: summary-building.json and translations-starbase_modules.json.

id.description: Upstream building id (bid) used by sync and scripts/import_stfcspace_buildings.mjs.
Building id / bid as used in game and upstream summary.

max_level.description: Maximum level for this building according to upstream data.

unlock_level.description: Operations level where this building becomes available; mapped to ops_min when normalizing bonuses.

buffs.description: Per-building buffs, each with id, values[], and value_is_percentage.

id.description: Buff id used across buildings, research, and other upstream entities.
Numeric buff identifier; used to map to engine stats or left as opaque buff_<id>.

loca_id.description: Localization id for this buff (if present); used to recover human-readable stat name from translations-starbase_modules.json or related tables.

value_is_percentage.description: If true, values[].value is fractional (0.05 = +5%); if false, values are flat.

values.description: Per-level cumulative buff values. values[i] describes total bonus at building level (i+1). Incremental level N bonus is cumulative[N] - cumulative[N-1] with cumulative[0] = 0.

id.description: Stat value at this building level.

value.description: Cumulative stat value at this level; exact meaning depends on stat mapping.

chance.description: Buff application chance (normally 1 for deterministic building bonuses).

relations.description: import_stfcspace_buildings.mjs maps upstream building id/bid to Kobayashi building id using BUILDING_META and translations-starbase_modules.json.
buff_id_to_stat.json optionally maps buff ids to engine stat names (weapon_damage, hull_hp, shield_hp, etc.) for combat-relevant bonuses.
BUFF_ID_TO_STAT_NAME.md describes how buff loca_id can be resolved to human-readable stat labels via translations-starbase_modules.json and related translation tables.

normalization_targets.description: scripts/import_stfcspace_buildings.mjs converts cumulative buff series into per-level bonuses for each building, writing normalized BuildingRecord JSON files.
buff_id_to_stat.json acts as an import-time normalization overlay mapping building buff ids to engine stat keys for combat.
Building index aggregates normalized buildings and records data_version/source_note for provenance.

notes: See data/upstream/data-stfc-space/BUILDING_LEVEL_BONUSES.md for detailed explanation of cumulative vs incremental building bonuses.
See data/upstream/data-stfc-space/BUFF_ID_TO_STAT_NAME.md for guidelines on resolving buff ids and loca_ids to human-readable stat names and engine stats.
